description:
Implement `hx-split-panel` (T3 tier) — 2/6 libraries ship this. Resizable two-pane layout with a draggable divider.

**Files to create** in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-split-panel/`:
- `index.ts`, `hx-split-panel.ts`, `hx-split-panel.styles.ts`, `hx-split-panel.stories.ts`, `hx-split-panel.test.ts`

**Props:** `position` (number 0-100, percentage of start panel), `position-in-pixels` (number — alternative to percentage), `orientation` (`horizontal`|`vertical`), `snap` (number[] — snap points as percentages), `disabled` (boolean — prevent resizing)

**Slots:** `start` (first panel), default (ignored — use named slots), `end` (second panel)

**Events:** `hx-reposition` (`{ position }`)

**CSS Parts:** `start`, `divider`, `end`

**ARIA:** Divider is `role="separator"` with `aria-valuenow` (current position), `aria-valuemin="0"`, `aria-valuemax="100"`. Keyboard: Arrow keys move divider by 1%, Home/End move to extremes.

**Interaction:** Mouse/touch drag on divider. Pointer events. Constrain min/max to prevent panels from collapsing entirely (min 0%, max 100% but with sensible minimum panel size).

**Quality gates:** type-check zero errors, all tests (drag, keyboard, snap points, disabled), axe-core zero violations, Storybook horizontal + vertical + with snap points, bundle < 4KB.

Register in `packages/hx-library/src/index.ts` and `packages/hx-library/vite.config.ts`.
title: IMPLEMENT: hx-split-panel — T3 Resizable Split Panel
